message: No action needed: Commit 1f9b8a6 (PR #58440) is a post-release version increment for Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents, and Azure.AI.Projects. It only bumps package versions and adds empty "(Unreleased)" CHANGELOG sections — no new implementation code. The READMEs for all three packages already document the features from the 2.1.0-beta.1 release (AgentToolboxes, Sessions, AgentSessionFiles, ProjectAgentSkills, GetSessionLog, Toolboxes).
